skill.name: higgsfield-marketplace-cards
skill.description: Generate marketplace product image cards through Higgsfield: compliant main image, secondary product images, and A+ style content modules for e-commerce listings.
skill.summary: Create compliant marketplace product images with AI. Supports main images, secondary product shots, and A+ brand content for e-commerce listings.
skill.author: higgsfield-ai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 49 static findings across 5 categories. 48 are false positives: 41 external_commands are markdown CLI examples for the legitimate higgsfield binary, 3 network findings point to the official GitHub installer and placeholder output URLs, 2 weak crypto findings are misclassifications of YAML frontmatter and UX rules, and 1 system reconnaissance finding is a safety instruction. 1 true positive (pipe-to-shell install pattern on line 26) is the documented official install method for a well-known CLI tool with no obfuscation or hidden behavior.

dangerous_patterns.title: Pipe to shell installation pattern
dangerous_patterns.description: SKILL.md line 26 uses curl piped to sh for CLI installation. This is a documented official installation method for the higgsfield CLI from the higgsfield-ai GitHub organization. The URL points to the official repository and the intent is transparent installation, not malicious payload delivery. Risk is low because the source is the project's own official GitHub repository.

content.user_title: Generate marketplace-ready product images for your listings
content.value_statement: Creating compliant marketplace product images requires following platform-specific rules for size, content, and style. This skill generates main images, secondary product shots, and A+ brand content modules that meet marketplace requirements using the Higgsfield AI platform.
actual_capabilities: Generate compliant marketplace main images from product photos or text descriptions
Create sets of secondary product images including infographic, lifestyle, and detail shots
Produce A+ style content modules such as hero banners, pain points, features, and ingredients
Run full image sets combining main, secondary, and A+ modules in a single command
Reuse existing completed main image jobs to generate matching secondary or A+ assets
limitations: Does not generate generic brand product photography outside marketplace context
Cannot produce video content or UGC-style advertisements
Does not train custom character models or generate personalized avatars
Image prompts are handled by backend enhancement, not written by the skill directly

use_cases.title: Launch a new product on an online marketplace
use_cases.description: An e-commerce seller needs compliant main and secondary images for a new product listing. This skill generates a full set of marketplace-ready images from a product photo and short description.

use_cases.title: Upgrade existing listings with A+ brand content
use_cases.description: A marketplace seller wants to add rich A+ content modules to improve conversion. This skill produces hero banners, feature highlights, and ingredient visuals that meet platform specifications.

use_cases.title: Create a visual system for a product catalog
use_cases.description: A product manager needs consistent image sets across multiple SKUs. This skill applies the same scope and style settings to produce a cohesive look for an entire product line.

prompt_templates.title: Generate a single main marketplace image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a marketplace main image for my organic matcha powder. Here is a photo of the product: [attach product image]. The listing is for a health food category on a major marketplace.
prompt_templates.scenario: First-time user with a product photo ready

prompt_templates.title: Create a full product image set
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a complete set of marketplace images for my ceramic coffee mug. Generate the main image plus 5 secondary images showing different angles, lifestyle use, and whats-in-box. Here is the product photo: [attach image].
prompt_templates.scenario: Seller who needs a complete listing package

prompt_templates.title: Add A+ content to an existing listing
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate A+ content modules for my skincare product listing. I already have a main image from a previous job with job ID abc123. Create hero banner, pain points, features, and how-to-use modules that match the existing style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Returning user with an existing main image job

prompt_templates.title: Custom asset selection for a specific listing
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom set of marketplace images for my protein powder. I need a main image, an infographic showing nutritional facts, a lifestyle shot of someone mixing the drink, and an A+ ingredients module. My brand uses a clean black and metallic gold palette.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user needing specific asset types and brand context

output_examples.input: Create a marketplace main image for my organic honey jar. Here is a photo of the product on a white background.
output_examples.output:
Marketplace cards ready:
- Main image: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_abc123_main.jpg
- Dimensions: 2000x2000 px, RGB, JPEG

output_examples.input: Generate a full product image set for my bamboo cutting board. Main image plus 5 secondary shots.
output_examples.output:
Marketplace cards ready:
- Main image: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_main.jpg
- Multi-angle: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_angle.jpg
- Lifestyle: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_lifestyle.jpg
- Detail shot: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_detail.jpg
- Infographic: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_info.jpg
- Whats in box: https://cdn.higgsfield.ai/output/job_def456_box.jpg

best_practices: Provide a clear product photo and a short description of the listing context for best results
Use scope presets (main, product-images, aplus, full-set) instead of listing individual assets for common bundles
Include brand context, category, and visual style flags when you need a specific look and feel
anti_patterns: Do not write final image generation prompts yourself. The backend enhancement system handles prompt creation
Do not ask for video content or character-based generation. Use higgsfield-generate for those needs
Do not request generic brand photography without marketplace listing context. Use higgsfield-product-photoshoot instead

faq.question: What image types can this skill generate?
faq.answer: It generates marketplace main images, secondary product images (infographic, multi-angle, lifestyle, whats-in-box), and A+ content modules (hero banner, pain points, features, how-to-use).

faq.question: Do I need to provide a product photo?
faq.answer: A product photo gives the best results. If you only have a text description, the skill can proceed when product details are clear.

faq.question: Can I reuse images from a previous job?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the --main-job flag with a completed main image job ID to generate matching secondary or A+ assets.

faq.question: What is the difference between secondary images and A+ content?
faq.answer: Secondary images are standard listing photos like lifestyle shots and infographics. A+ content modules are rich brand storytelling blocks like hero banners and feature highlights.

faq.question: Does this skill support video generation?
faq.answer: No. This skill is for static marketplace images only. Use the higgsfield-generate skill for video content.

faq.question: How do I install the Higgsfield CLI?
faq.answer: Run the official installer script from the Higgsfield GitHub repository. The skill guides you through authentication after installation.
